title: Tunisian Fish Tagine
description: A flavorful North African-inspired fish dish cooked in a traditional clay pot. Flaky fish, aromatic spices, and a hint of sweetness come together in this easy-to-make tagine.
instructions: Season the fish with salt and black pepper.
Heat the flavored olive oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the gently fried onions and cook until fragrant.
Add the Tunisian Tagine Spice Mix and cook for 1 minute.
Arrange the fish in the pot and spoon some of the spice mix over the top.
Pour in the lemon juice and honey.
Cover the pot and cook for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
